repositories.name: Custom-AI-Jira-Agent
repositories.description: A custom AI Jira agent, with a tool to preform triage on newly created Jira issues. The project makes use of LangChain agents, served via Django (with PostgreSQL) and Google Mesop. Services are provided in Docker to be run locally. The prompting strategy includes a CO-STAR system prompt, Chain-of-Thought (CoT) reasoning with few-shot prompting.
